actual_current_surface_status: bounded-support / FH-LSZ chunk045 v2 multi-tau target-timeseries checkpoint

scalar_source_response_metadata.source_coordinate: uniform additive lattice scalar source s entering the Dirac mass as m_bare + s

scalar_two_point_lsz_metadata.measurement_object: C_ss(q)=Tr[S V_q S V_-q] for the same additive scalar source

normal_equation_cache.reuse: D, D^dagger, and D^dagger D are built once per needed mass/source per configuration and reused across point-source and stochastic RHS solves
normal_equation_cache.scope: per saved gauge configuration and smeared measurement gauge

selected_mass_policy.strict_limit: Selected-mass source-coordinate FH/LSZ target time series are performance/instrumentation support only; they are not physical y_t evidence until canonical-Higgs/source-overlap or W/Z response identity gates close.

required_measurement_objects: O_H or radial canonical-Higgs observable on the same Cl3/Z3 source surface
source_higgs_guard.strict_limit: Finite-mode source-Higgs rows are not pole residues and must not be treated as source-Higgs Gram purity or canonical-Higgs normalization evidence until the source-Higgs certificate builder, Gram-purity postprocessor, and retained-route gates pass.

required_measurement_objects: fitted dM_W/ds or dM_Z/ds under the same scalar source
wz_response_guard.strict_limit: This QCD top-correlator harness does not measure W/Z mass response.  Static EW algebra or absent W/Z slopes must not be used as dM_W/ds evidence.

exact_next_action: Accumulate more v2 chunks, then run a same-schema multi-tau response-window covariance gate with multiple source radii or a same-surface source-Higgs/WZ identity before any readout switch can be considered.
proposal_allowed_reason: Source-only FH/LSZ rows do not derive kappa_s, source-Higgs overlap, W/Z response, or retained top-Yukawa closure.
strict_non_claims: does not use source-only FH/LSZ as physical y_t
does not use H_unit, Ward authority, observed values, alpha_LM, plaquette, or u0 as proof input
does not treat a single chunk as retained or proposed-retained evidence
verdict: L12_T24 chunk045 carries production metadata, fixed numba seed control, selected-mass-only source-response/LSZ metadata, legacy tau=1 target rows, and v2 multi-tau source-response rows.  This is infrastructure support for later covariance and response-window gates only; it is not a physical y_t readout.
